title: Portfolio Module ships next week
content_html:
The Portfolio Module goes live next week, giving every Cryptool user a single, complete view of their investments.

What ships with it:

  • Allocation across assets and categories at a glance
  • Status and performance per investment, updated live
  • Vesting schedules and the next unlock date for every position

This is the first step of a wider release. The OTC module, which brings on-platform secondary trading for vested and unvested positions, follows shortly after.
author: Cryptool
